child_chunk.text:
Document: Aquila SmartGrid RAG PPTX Fixture
Section: Slide 3

Policy Register

Exact policy language appears in cells and should not be summarized away.

ID

Policy

Exact Rule

Owner

P-001

Critical outage escalation

P1 incidents affecting >5,000 meters escalate to GridOps within 10 minutes; regulator within 45 minutes if ETA exceeds 2 hours.

GridOps Lead

P-002

Data retention

Raw telemetry: 18 months. Hourly aggregates: 7 years. Customer-identifiable exports: 30 days.

Data Governance

P-004

Password rotation exception

Gateway service accounts rotate every 90 days, except satellite-mode substations sync within 14 days.

Security Engineering

P-005

Model-assisted triage

AI suggestions are advisory; human dispatchers confirm safety classification before crew assignment.

Service Desk Manager

Stress test: answer extraction must cite the right policy row, not a similar phrase from another slide.

Aquila synthetic RAG PPTX fixture | slide 3

Exact values: 10 min, 45 min, 14 days, 30 days, 90 days, 18 months, 7 years

child_chunk.text:
Document: Document Control
Section: Policy Register

Policy Register

| Policy ID | Title | Exact Rule | Owner | Retrieval Difficulty |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| P-001 | Critical outage escalation | P1 incidents affecting more than 5,000 meters must be escalated to GridOps within 10 minutes and to the regulator within 45 minutes if restoration estimate exceeds 2 hours. | GridOps Lead | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-002 | Data retention | Raw telemetry is retained for 18 months. Aggregated hourly metrics are retained for 7 years. Customer-identifiable exports must expire after 30 days. | Data Governance | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-003 | Maintenance freeze | No non-emergency transformer maintenance may be started during the June peak-load freeze window unless approved by both Operations and Compliance. | Maintenance Director | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-004 | Password rotation exception | Service accounts used by field gateways rotate every 90 days, except offline substations in satellite mode which rotate at the next successful sync within 14 days. | Security Engineering | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |
| P-005 | Model-assisted triage | AI triage suggestions are advisory. Human dispatchers must confirm safety classification before a field crew is assigned. | Service Desk Manager | Exact numeric or exception retrieval |

Question

Expected Answer

Evidence

Which policy has the 14-day exception?

P-004 password rotation exception

Policy Register + speaker notes

How long are hourly aggregates retained?

7 years

P-002

Can AI triage assign a crew without human confirmation?

No

P-005

What does FY26-Q3 deliver?

Table normalizer

Roadmap Timeline

What is target chunk size?

650 tokens

Code and Configuration Snippets

Use this slide as a golden test set for answer quality and evidence citation.

child_chunk.text:
Document: Security Runbook - Aquila RAG Markdown Fixture
Section: Security Runbook - Aquila RAG Markdown Fixture > Security Controls

Security Controls

| Control | Required? | Frequency | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| Service-account key rotation | Yes | 90 days | Satellite-mode exception: sync within 14 days |
| Gateway certificate check | Yes | every connection | Reject expired or unknown issuer |
| Export expiry | Yes | 30 days | Applies to customer-identifiable exports |
| Human confirmation | Yes | every safety case | AI output is advisory |
parent_path: Security Runbook - Aquila RAG Markdown Fixture
